items.title: Language model harnesses are compositional generalizers
items.summary: Harnesses can lead to compositional generalization: we observe a property in training RLMs, in which similarly structured tasks are viewed as isomorphic and all individual LM calls in the harness become in-distribution.
items.titleZh: 语言模型的Harnesses具备组合泛化能力
items.summaryZh: Harnesses可以实现组合泛化：我们在训练RLM时观察到一种性质，即结构相似的任务被视为同构，harness中的所有单独语言模型调用都变为分布内。

items.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
items.summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become central to improving large language models (LLMs) on complex reasoning tasks, yet RL post-training is largely studied in isolation from the pretraining that precedes it. As a result, two basic questions remain open: (1) how do pretraining ch
items.titleZh: 从预训练到后训练理解推理
items.summaryZh: 强化学习（RL）已成为提升大型语言模型（LLMs）复杂推理任务能力的核心，但RL后训练通常独立于之前的预训练研究。因此，两个基本问题仍未解决：（1）预训练如何影响后续训练。

items.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback. Outcome-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a practical optimization paradigm, but its sparse trajectory-level
items.titleZh: SEED：面向自主强化学习的自我进化在策略蒸馏
items.summaryZh: 大型语言模型正日益作为交互代理训练，用于涉及多轮交互、工具使用和环境反馈的长时任务。基于结果的强化学习（RL）提供了实用的优化范式，但其稀疏的轨迹级反馈存在挑战。

items.title: Loop the Loopies!
items.summary: We present Loopie, the most powerful looped Transformer to date. The Loopie series consists of two Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models: a 20B-parameter model with 2B active parameters and a 6Bparameter model with 0.6B active parameters. Looped Transformers have long faced a challenge
items.titleZh: Loop the Loopies！
items.summaryZh: 我们推出了Loopie，迄今为止最强大的循环Transformer。Loopie系列包含两个专家混合（MoE）模型：一个20B参数、2B激活参数模型和一个6B参数、0.6B激活参数模型。循环Transformer长期面临挑战。

items.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation
items.summary: On-policy distillation is an alternative post-training method in reinforcement learning that alleviates the constraints imposed by reward models by providing token-level supervision from a teacher model. Although on-policy distillation has been studied and applied across various
items.titleZh: 在策略Delta蒸馏
items.summaryZh: 在策略蒸馏是强化学习中的一种替代后训练方法，通过提供来自教师模型的逐令牌监督，缓解了奖励模型带来的限制。尽管在多个领域已有研究和应用。

items.title: Video = World + Event Stream
items.summary: We present Wan-Streamer v0.3, which reframes our native-streaming interaction model under a single organizing view: a video is a world plus an event stream. The world is the persistent context in which a video unfolds, including the environment, scene, subjects, ambient acoustic
items.titleZh: 视频=世界+事件流
items.summaryZh: 我们介绍了Wan-Streamer v0.3，将原生流交互模型重新框定为单一组织视角：视频是世界加事件流。世界是视频展开的持久上下文，包括环境、场景、主体和环境声学。

items.title: RoboTTT: Context Scaling for Robot Policies
items.summary: Recent robot foundation models operate with single-step or short-history visuomotor context. We introduce Test-Time-Training Robot Policies (RoboTTT), a robot model and training recipe that scale visuomotor context to 8K timesteps, three orders of magnitude beyond state-of-the-ar
items.titleZh: RoboTTT：机器人策略的上下文扩展
items.summaryZh: 近期机器人基础模型仅使用单步或短历史视觉运动上下文。我们提出测试时训练机器人策略（RoboTTT），一种机器人模型及训练方案，将视觉运动上下文扩展至8K时间步，超越现有水平三数量级。

items.title: Audio-Visual Flamingo: Open Audio-Visual Intelligence for Long and Complex Videos
items.summary: We present Audio-Visual Flamingo (AV-Flamingo), a fully open state-of-the-art audio-visual large language model (AV-LLM) for joint understanding and reasoning over audio, images, and long-form videos. Unlike prior AV-LLMs that primarily focus on short clips, AV-Flamingo is design
items.titleZh: 音视频Flamingo：面向长复杂视频的开放音视频智能
items.summaryZh: 我们推出了Audio-Visual Flamingo（AV-Flamingo），一款完全开放的最先进音视频大型语言模型（AV-LLM），用于音频、图像和长视频的联合理解与推理。与以往主要聚焦短片的AV-LLM不同，AV-Flamingo设计用于。

items.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
items.summary: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream task
items.titleZh: 小米机器人1号：基于10万小时真实轨迹的视觉-语言-动作模型扩展
items.summaryZh: 我们推出了小米机器人1号，一款基础视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，能够（1）遵循多样语言指令，开箱即用执行多种移动操作任务于未知环境，（2）高效适应新下游任务。

items.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
items.summary: Recent advances in video understanding have spanned motion, long video, and streaming interaction, driving this field toward real-world applications. Despite this progress, current open-source models remain limited in several ways. They often struggle to generalize across diverse

items.summary: Security-agent evaluations commonly measure peak offensive capability under generous inference budgets, emphasizing vulnerability discovery, exploit development, penetration testing, and CTF completion. Such measurements are useful but incomplete: in operational security, every r
items.titleZh: 超越成功率：面向攻防安全代理的成本感知评估
items.summaryZh: 安全代理评估通常在宽松推理预算下测量峰值攻击能力，侧重漏洞发现、漏洞利用、渗透测试和CTF完成。这些测量有用但不完整：在实际安全中，每一次风险都需权衡成本。

items.title: SVR-R1: Bootstrapping Multi-modal Reasoning with Self-verification in Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: We introduce Self-Verified Reasoner (SVR-R1), a multi-turn RL framework that turns a model's own verification into a learning signal for multimodal reasoning. For each query, the model proposes an answer using the same weights, and issues a binary self-verdict (Yes/No). A 'No' tr
items.titleZh: SVR-R1：基于自我验证的多模态推理强化学习引导
items.summaryZh: 我们提出自我验证推理器（SVR-R1），一种多轮强化学习框架，将模型自身验证转化为多模态推理的学习信号。对每个查询，模型用相同权重提出答案，并给出二元自我判定（是/否）。“否”触发。

items.title: Benchmarking Sensor Robustness in Plasma Diagnostic Models: A Systematic Evaluation on TokaMark

items.titleZh: 等离子体诊断模型传感器鲁棒性基准：TokaMark系统评估
items.summaryZh: 托卡马克聚变设备的等离子体诊断模型几乎都在干净完整的传感器数据上评估。实际上，诊断系统常常失效：采集系统延迟启动，单个传感器故障，信号丢失正好集中在等离子体扰动时刻。

items.title: REBASE: Reference-Background Subspace Elimination for Training-Free In-Context Segmentation
items.summary: Training-free in-context segmentation enables new object categories to be introduced at inference time from a single annotated reference image, eliminating the retraining and memory overhead of class-incremental learning. Recent approaches achieve this by combining vision foundat
items.titleZh: REBASE：无训练上下文分割的参考背景子空间消除

items.title: Behavioral Privacy Leakage in Agentic Negotiation: Formalizing and Mitigating Inference Attacks via Randomized Policies

items.titleZh: 代理谈判中的行为隐私泄露：通过随机策略形式化与缓解推断攻击

items.title: See like a Robot: Robot-Centric Pointmaps for Vision-Language-Action Models
items.summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models predict robot actions from visual observations and language instructions. These actions are defined in the robot's own 3D coordinate frame, yet most VLAs observe the scene in the camera frame, creating a frame mismatch between where the scene i
items.titleZh: 像机器人一样看：面向视觉-语言-动作模型的机器人中心点云图
items.summaryZh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型根据视觉观察和语言指令预测机器人动作。动作定义在机器人自身的3D坐标系中，但大多数VLA观察场景于摄像机坐标系，导致坐标系不匹配。

items.title: Agon: Competitive Cross-Model RL with Implicit Rival Grading of Reasoning
items.summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (e.g. GRPO) is the engine behind today's reasoning models, yet it grades only the final answer. On hard problems this trains models to write more rather than to think better, since the trace itself is never graded and no label for go
items.titleZh: Agon：带隐式对手推理评分的竞争性跨模型强化学习
items.summaryZh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（如GRPO）是当前推理模型的驱动力，但仅对最终答案评分。对于难题，这训练模型写得更多而非思考更好，因为推理过程未被评分且无中间标签。

items.title: RESOURCE2SKILL: Distilling Executable Agent Skills from Human-Created Multimodal Resources

items.title: Beyond Entropy: Correctness-Aware Advantage Shaping via Contrastive Policy Optimization

items.titleZh: 超越熵：通过对比策略优化实现正确性感知的优势塑造
items.summaryZh: 带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）通常使用熵进行优势塑造，但熵无法区分有用的不确定性和有害的混淆，限制了其作为正确性信号的效果。我们提出了对比策略优化（CP）。

items.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
items.summary: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. We study vanilla Muon in sparse-reward agentic RL through matched single-seed comparisons with AdamW on ALFWorld using Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct. U
items.titleZh: Muon何时助力自主强化学习？
items.summaryZh: Muon在大规模预训练中与AdamW竞争力相当，但其在强化学习后训练中的价值尚不明确。我们通过与AdamW在ALFWorld上使用Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct的单次种子匹配比较，研究了基础Muon在稀疏奖励自主强化学习中的表现。
